    "content": "                    scale_dtype = dtypes_json.get(scale_name, None)\n                    assert scale_dtype == \"UE8\"\n                    is_dynamic_quant = False\n                    has_mxfp4 = True\n\n        if has_mxfp4:\n            quant_config.quant_algo = ModelConfig.get_mxfp4_quant_algo(\n                moe_backend, is_dynamic_quant)\n            quant_config.group_size = 32\n            quant_config.exclude_modules = list(exclude_modules)\n            logger.info(f\"Setting quant_config: {quant_config}\")\n\n        return quant_config, layer_quant_config\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def override_quant_algo():\n        new_algo = os.environ.get(\"OVERRIDE_QUANT_ALGO\", None)\n        supported_algos = {\n            \"W4A16_MXFP4\": QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,\n            \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\": QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,\n            \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\": QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,\n        }\n        if new_algo is not None:\n            if new_algo.upper() in supported_algos:\n                return supported_algos[new_algo.upper()]\n            else:\n                logger.warning(\n                    f\"Unsupported quant algo: {new_algo}, supported algos: {supported_algos.keys()}\"\n                )\n        return None\n\n    @classmethod\n    def from_pretrained(cls,\n                        checkpoint_dir: str,\n                        trust_remote_code=False,\n                        **kwargs):\n        # Use file lock to prevent race conditions when multiple processes\n        # try to import/cache the same remote model config file\n        with config_file_lock():\n            # When handling the case where model_format is TLLM_ENGINE\n            # send cyclic requests to the NONE URL.\n            if checkpoint_dir is not None:\n                pretrained_config = load_pretrained_config(\n                    checkpoint_dir,\n                    trust_remote_code=trust_remote_code,\n                    **kwargs,\n                )\n                if pretrained_config.architectures[\n                        0] == \"DeepseekV32ForCausalLM\":\n                    sparse_attention_config = kwargs.get(\n                        'sparse_attention_config')\n                    if sparse_attention_config:\n                        index_n_heads = sparse_attention_config.index_n_heads or pretrained_config.index_n_heads\n                        index_head_dim = sparse_attention_config.index_head_dim or pretrained_config.index_head_dim\n                        index_topk = sparse_attention_config.index_topk or pretrained_config.index_topk\n                        indexer_max_chunk_size = sparse_attention_config.indexer_max_chunk_size\n                        skip_indexer_for_short_seqs = sparse_attention_config.skip_indexer_for_short_seqs\n                    else:\n                        index_n_heads = pretrained_config.index_n_heads\n                        index_head_dim = pretrained_config.index_head_dim\n                        index_topk = pretrained_config.index_topk\n                        indexer_max_chunk_size = None\n                        skip_indexer_for_short_seqs = True\n                    kwargs[\n                        'sparse_attention_config'] = DeepSeekSparseAttentionConfig(\n                            index_n_heads=index_n_heads,\n                            index_head_dim=index_head_dim,\n                            index_topk=index_topk,\n                            indexer_max_chunk_size=indexer_max_chunk_size,\n                            skip_indexer_for_short_seqs=\n                            skip_indexer_for_short_seqs)\n            else:\n                raise ValueError(\n                    \"checkpoint_dir is None. Cannot load model config without a valid checkpoint directory.\"\n                )\n\n        # Get cached file from path or repo id, return None if not exists.\n        def cached_file(path_or_repo_id, file_name):\n            try:\n                return transformers.utils.hub.cached_file(\n                    path_or_repo_id, file_name)\n            except OSError:\n                return None\n\n        # Some checkpoints lack torch_dtype, populate with dtype\n        pretrained_config.torch_dtype = getattr(pretrained_config, 'dtype',\n                                                None)\n\n        # Apply model_kwargs to override config parameters if provided\n        model_kwargs = kwargs.pop('model_kwargs', None)\n        if model_kwargs:\n\n            def _recursive_update_config(config: transformers.PretrainedConfig,\n                                         update_dict: Dict[str, Any]):\n                \"\"\"\n                Recursively update a PretrainedConfig object with values from update_dict.\n                Args:\n                    config: PretrainedConfig object to update\n                    update_dict: Dictionary with values to update in the config\n                \"\"\"",

  "stdout": "331:    def get_mxfp4_quant_algo(moe_backend, is_dynamic_quant=False):\n336:                    return QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n338:                    return QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n340:                return QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4\n374:        # MXFP4 checkpoints.\n375:        elif hf_quant_config.get(\"quant_method\") == \"mxfp4\":\n376:            quant_config.quant_algo = ModelConfig.get_mxfp4_quant_algo(\n380:            # Default exclude_modules for MXFP4 (TRTLLM internal format)\n445:        has_mxfp4 = False\n454:                    elif dtype == \"MXFP4\":\n457:                        has_mxfp4 = True\n463:                    has_mxfp4 = True\n465:        if has_mxfp4:\n466:            quant_config.quant_algo = ModelConfig.get_mxfp4_quant_algo(\n478:            \"W4A16_MXFP4\": QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,\n479:            \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\": QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,\n480:            \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\": QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,"
}

32. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/tests/unittest/_torch/thop/parallel/test_w4a8_linear.py",
  "limit": 100
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "import pytest\nimport torch\nfrom torch.nn.parameter import Parameter\n\nimport tensorrt_llm.quantization.functional\nfrom tensorrt_llm._torch.autotuner import autotune\nfrom tensorrt_llm._torch.custom_ops.torch_custom_ops import \\\n    FinegrainedMixedDtypeGemm\nfrom tensorrt_llm._torch.modules.linear import Linear\nfrom tensorrt_llm._utils import get_sm_version\nfrom tensorrt_llm.models.modeling_utils import QuantAlgo, QuantConfig\n\n\n@pytest.mark.parametrize(\"weights_dtype\", [torch.uint8])\n@pytest.mark.parametrize(\n    \"dtype\",\n    [torch.float16],\n)\ndef test_w4a8_linear(dtype, weights_dtype, has_zero=False):\n\n    if get_sm_version() > FinegrainedMixedDtypeGemm.MAX_SUPPORTED_SM_VERSION:\n        pytest.skip(\n            f\"W4A16/W4A8 is not supported in this SM version {get_sm_version()}\"\n        )\n\n    SEQ_LEN = 10\n    HIDDEN_SIZE = 128\n    OUTPUT_SIZE = 512\n    GROUP_SIZE = 128\n    torch.manual_seed(0)\n\n    total_groups = (HIDDEN_SIZE + GROUP_SIZE - 1) // GROUP_SIZE\n\n    x = torch.randn((SEQ_LEN, HIDDEN_SIZE), dtype=dtype).cuda()\n    w = torch.randint(0,\n                      2**32 - 1, (HIDDEN_SIZE, OUTPUT_SIZE // 8),\n                      dtype=torch.uint32,\n                      device=x.device)\n    w = w.view(weights_dtype)\n\n    pre_quant_scale = torch.rand(HIDDEN_SIZE, dtype=dtype).cuda()\n    weight_scale = torch.rand(total_groups, OUTPUT_SIZE,\n                              dtype=torch.float16).cuda()\n    weight_scale_2 = torch.rand(1, dtype=torch.float32).cuda()\n    input_scale = Parameter(torch.tensor(1., dtype=torch.float32),\n                            requires_grad=False).cuda()\n    bias = torch.randn(OUTPUT_SIZE, dtype=dtype).cuda().contiguous()\n\n    qc = QuantConfig(quant_algo=QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ,\n                     group_size=GROUP_SIZE,\n                     has_zero_point=has_zero)\n\n    linear_w4a8 = Linear(in_features=HIDDEN_SIZE,\n                         out_features=OUTPUT_SIZE,\n                         bias=True,\n                         dtype=dtype,\n                         quant_config=qc)\n\n    linear_w4a8.load_weights([{\n        'pre_quant_scale': pre_quant_scale,\n        'weight': w.T.clone(),\n        'weight_scale': weight_scale.T,\n        'bias': bias,\n        'weight_scale_2': weight_scale_2,\n        'input_scale': input_scale\n    }])\n\n    linear_w4a8 = linear_w4a8.cuda()\n\n    preprocessor = tensorrt_llm.quantization.functional.preprocess_weights_for_mixed_gemm\n    w = preprocessor(\n        w.to(torch.int8).contiguous().cpu(), torch.quint4x2,\n        torch.float8_e4m3fn).cuda().contiguous()\n\n    torch.testing.assert_close(linear_w4a8.weight, w)\n\n    with torch.inference_mode(), autotune():\n        output = linear_w4a8.forward(x)\n\n    # ref linear\n    with torch.inference_mode():\n        x = x * pre_quant_scale\n\n        quantized_input, _ = torch.ops.tensorrt_llm.static_quantize_e4m3_per_tensor(\n            x, (input_scale))\n        alpha = (weight_scale_2.float() * input_scale.float()).item()\n\n        output_ref = torch.ops.trtllm.finegrained_mixed_dtype_gemm(\n            input=quantized_input.contiguous(),\n            weight=w.contiguous(),\n            scales=(weight_scale / weight_scale_2).to(\n                torch.float16).contiguous(),\n            group_size=GROUP_SIZE,\n            has_zero_point=has_zero,\n            output_dtype=x.dtype,\n            alpha=alpha,\n            bias=bias,\n            zeros=None)\n    torch.cuda.synchronize()\n    torch.testing.assert_close(output, output_ref)",
    "filePath": "/workspace/tests/unittest/_torch/thop/parallel/test_w4a8_linear.py",
    "numLines": 100,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 101
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2022-2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\nimport unittest\n\nfrom tensorrt_llm.quantization import QuantMode\n\n\nclass TestQuantMode(unittest.TestCase):\n\n    def test_all(self):\n        # Set activations and weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Make sure _all returns True when asked for both ACTIVATIONS and INT8_WEIGHTS.\n        self.assertTrue(qm._all(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS))\n        # Make sure _all returns False when asked only for ACTIVATIONS.\n        self.assertFalse(qm._all(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS))\n        # Make sure _all returns True when asked only for ACTIVATIONS if limited to ACTIVATIONS flag.\n        self.assertTrue(\n            qm._all(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS, mask=QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS))\n\n    def test_any(self):\n        # Set activations and weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Make sure _any returns True when asked for both ACTIVATIONS and INT8_WEIGHTS.\n        self.assertTrue(qm._any(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS))\n        # Make sure _any returns True when asked only for ACTIVATIONS.\n        self.assertTrue(qm._any(QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS))\n        # Make sure _any returns False when asked for PER_TOKEN.\n        self.assertFalse(qm._any(QuantMode.PER_TOKEN))\n\n    def test_count(self):\n        # Make sure the COUNT value is as expected - change that test if you add a new flag.\n        self.assertEqual(QuantMode.COUNT.value, 1 << 18)\n\n    def test_from_description(self):\n        # Test weight only.\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, False, False, False)\n        # Make sure only the INT8_WEIGHTS flag is set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n        # Test weight only.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_weight_only()\n        # Make sure only the INT8_WEIGHTS flag is set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n        # Test weight only (int4).\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, False, False, False, False, True)\n        # Make sure only the INT4_WEIGHTS flag is set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS)\n\n        # Test weight only.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True)\n        # Make sure only the INT4_WEIGHTS flag is set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-tensor.\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, True, False, False)\n        # The reference.\n        expected_qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure ACTIVATIONS and INT8_WEIGHTS flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-tensor.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant()\n        # Make sure ACTIVATIONS and INT8_WEIGHTS flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-tensor & per-channel.\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, True, False, True)\n        # The reference.\n        expected_qm = expected_qm | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        # Make sure ACTIVATIONS, INT8_WEIGHTS and PER_CHANNEL flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-tensor & per-channel.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_channel=True)\n        # Make sure ACTIVATIONS, INT8_WEIGHTS and PER_CHANNEL flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-token & per-channel.\n        qm = QuantMode.from_description(True, True, True, True)\n        # The expected result.\n        expected_qm = expected_qm | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        # Make sure all flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n        # Test activation/weight per-token & per-channel.\n        qm = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(True, True)\n        # Make sure all flags are set.\n        self.assertEqual(qm, expected_qm)\n\n    def test_per_channel(self):\n        # Set per-channel flag.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        # Make sure it returns True for per-channel.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_per_channel_scaling())\n        # Do not set per-channel flag.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns False for per-channel.\n        self.assertFalse(qm.has_per_channel_scaling())\n\n    def test_per_token(self):\n        # Set per-token flag.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        # Make sure it returns True for per-token.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling())\n        # Make sure it returns False for per-tensor.\n        self.assertFalse(qm.has_act_static_scaling())\n\n        # Do not set per-token flag.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns False for per-token.\n        self.assertFalse(qm.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling())\n        # Make sure it returns True for per-tensor.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_act_static_scaling())\n\n    def test_weights_only(self):\n        # Set weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_weight_only())\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_int8_weight_only())\n\n        # Set weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_weight_only())\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_int4_weight_only())\n\n        # Set activations and weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns False for weight-only.\n        self.assertFalse(qm.is_weight_only())\n\n    def test_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        # Set int8 kv cache flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n        # Make sure it returns True for kv_cache.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_int8_kv_cache())\n        # Make sure it returns True for any quantization.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_any_quant())\n\n        # Set weights flags.\n        qm = QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n        # Make sure it returns True for any quantization.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_any_quant())\n        # Set int8 KV cache flag.\n        qm = qm.set_int8_kv_cache()\n        # Make sure it returns True for kv_cache.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.has_int8_kv_cache())\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_weight_only())\n        # Make sure it returns True for weight-only.\n        self.assertTrue(qm.is_int8_weight_only())\n\n    def test_failure_quant(self):\n        # Expect failure if weights are not quantized, but activations are.\n        self.assertRaises(\n            ValueError,\n            lambda: QuantMode.from_description(False, True, False, False))\n\n        # Expect failure if per token and per channel quantization, but weights and activations are not quantized.\n        self.assertRaises(\n            ValueError,\n            lambda: QuantMode.from_description(False, False, True, True))\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    unittest.main()\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/tests/unittest/trt/quantization/test_mode.py",
    "numLines": 186,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 186
  },
  "type": "text"
}

const*>(fc2_dequant.data_ptr()),\n                /* fp8 output quant scale */ nullptr, static_cast<float const*>(fc1_input_dequant.data_ptr()),\n                fc2_quant.dim() == 1);\n        }\n        else if (isWMxfp4AFp8Quant())\n        {\n            TORCH_CHECK(quant_scales.has_value(), \"Expecting quant scales for W4A8_MXFP4_MXF8 quantization\");\n            TORCH_CHECK(quant_scales.value().size() == 5, \"Expecting 5 quant scales for W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 quantization\");\n\n            auto const fc1_weight_block = quant_scales.value()[0];\n            auto const fc1_global = quant_scales.value()[1];\n            auto const fc2_act_global = quant_scales.value()[2];\n            auto const fc2_weight_block = quant_scales.value()[3];\n            auto const fc2_global = quant_scales.value()[4];\n\n            // The input for scale fc1_weight_block / fc2_weight_block is packed into INT32\n            constexpr int FP8_PER_INT32 = 4;\n            // c10::ScalarType::Float);\n            CHECK_INPUT(fc2_weight_block, c10::ScalarType::Int);\n            CHECK_INPUT(fc2_global, c10::ScalarType::Float);\n            // Check ranks\n            TORCH_CHECK(fc1_weight_block.dim() == 3, \"fc1 weight block must be #D\");\n            TORCH_CHECK(fc1_global.dim() == 1, \"fc1 global must be 1D\");\n            TORCH_CHECK(fc2_act_global.dim() == 0 || fc2_act_global.dim() == 1,\n                \"fc2 act global must be a scalar or 1-D tensor\");\n            TORCH_CHECK(fc2_weight_block.dim() == 3, \"fc2 weight block must be 3D\");\n TmaWarpSpecializedGroupedGemmInput::MinNDimAlignmentMXFPX)\n                            * expand_ratio\n                    && fc1_weight_block.sizes()[2] * FP8_PER_INT32\n TmaWarpSpecializedGroupedGemmInput::MinKDimAlignmentMXFPX),\n                \"fc1 weight block size must be (num_experts_on_rank, inter_size * expand_ratio, hidden_size // 4 // \"\n == 0 || fc2_act_global.sizes()[0] == num_experts_on_rank,\n                \"fc2 act global must be scalar or (num_experts_on_rank,)\");\n            TORCH_CHECK(fc2_weight_block.sizes()[0] ==   "file": {
    "content": "    {\n        return isInt8Quant() || isInt4Quant();\n    }\n\n    bool isWMxfp4AFp8Quant() const\n    {\n        return mActivationDtype == c10::ScalarType::Float8_e4m3fn && mWeightDtype == c10::ScalarType::Long\n            && !mUseMxfp8ActScaling;\n    }\n\n    bool isWMxfp4AMxfp8Quant() const\n    {\n        return mActivationDtype == c10::ScalarType::Float8_e4m3fn && mWeightDtype == c10::ScalarType::Long\n            && mUseMxfp8ActScaling;\n    }\n};\n\n} // namespace torch_ext\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n\nTORCH_LIBRARY(trtllm, m)\n{\n    m.class_<tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FusedMoeRunner>(\"FusedMoeRunner\")\n        .def(torch::init<c10::ScalarType, c10::ScalarType, c10::ScalarType, bool, bool, bool, bool, bool>())\n        .def(\"run_gemm_profile\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FusedMoeRunner::runGemmProfile)\n        .def(\"get_tactic_num\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FusedMoeRunner::getTacticNum)\n        .def(\"run_moe\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FusedMoeRunner::runMoe)\n        .def(\"run_moe_min_latency\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FusedMoeRunner::runMoeMinLantency);\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/cpp/tensorrt_llm/thop/moeOp.cpp",
    "numLines": 31,
    "startLine": 1185,

  "file": {
    "content": "#endif\n#endif\n\n#ifdef ENABLE_FP8\n        if (isFp8Quant())\n        {\n            mKernelRunner = switch_output_type<__nv_fp8_e4m3, __nv_fp8_e4m3>(mOutputDtype);\n        }\n#endif\n#ifdef ENABLE_FP4\n        if (isWMxfp4AMxfp8Quant() || isWMxfp4AFp8Quant())\n        {\n            mInnerDimMultiplier = 16; // 16 FP4 -> 1 LONG\n            mKernelRunner = switch_output_type<__nv_fp8_e4m3, __nv_fp4_e2m1>(mOutputDtype);\n        }\n        if (isNvfp4Quant())\n        {\n            mInnerDimMultiplier = 16; // 16 FP4 -> 1 LONG\n            switch (mActivationDtype)\n            {\n            case c10::ScalarType::Half:\n#ifdef ENABLE_BF16\n            case c10::ScalarType::BFloat16:\n#endif\n                mKernelRunner = switch_output_type<__nv_fp4_e2m1, __nv_fp4_e2m1, true>(mOutputDtype);\n                break;\n            default: mKernelRunner = switch_output_type<__nv_fp4_e2m1, __nv_fp4_e2m1, false>(mOutputDtype);\n            }\n        }\n        if (isWFP4A16Quant())",
    "filePath": "/workspace/cpp/tensorrt_llm/thop/moeOp.cpp",

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "        QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"in\", {89, 90}),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16},\n        },\n        # W8A16: SM >= 80\n        QuantAlgo.W8A16: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"min\", 80),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16},\n        },\n        # W4A16_MXFP4: SM == 90 only\n        QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"exact\", 90),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16},\n        },\n        # W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: SM in {100, 103}\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"in\", {100, 103}),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16, torch.float32},\n        },\n        # W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: SM in {100, 103}\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: {\n            \"sm_constraint\": (\"in\", {100, 103}),\n            \"dtypes\": {torch.float16, torch.bfloat16},\n        },\n    }\n\n    # Quantization algorithms that support gptoss_style\n    _GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS = {QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8}\n\n    @classmethod\n    def can_implement(\n        cls,\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo],\n        dtype_activation: torch.dtype = torch.bfloat16,\n        gptoss_style: bool = False,\n    ) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Check if CutlassFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.\n\n        CutlassFusedMoE supports:\n        - Unquantized (FP16/BF16): SM >= 80\n        - FP8 per-tensor (QDQ): SM >= 89\n        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES: SM == 90 only\n        - NVFP4: SM in {100, 103}\n        - W4A8_AWQ: SM in {89, 90} only\n        - W8A16: SM >= 80\n        - W4A16_MXFP4: SM == 90 only\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: SM in {100, 103}\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: SM in {100, 103}\n\n        Args:\n            quant_algo: The quantization algorithm to check (None for unquantized)\n            dtype_activation: The activation input data type (before quantization).\n                Supported dtypes vary by quantization mode:\n                - Unquantized: float16, bfloat16\n                - FP8/FP8_BLOCK_SCALES/W4A8_MXFP4_FP8: float16, bfloat16, float32\n                - NVFP4: float16, bfloat16, float8_e4m3fn\n                - W4A16_MXFP4/W4A8_AWQ/W8A16/W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8: float16, bfloat16\n            gptoss_style: Whether gptoss_style (bias/swiglu with custom alpha/beta/limit) is enabled.\n                CutlassFusedMoE only supports gptoss_style for W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 quantization.\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]: (can_implement, skip_reason)\n        \"\"\"\n        from .interface import _warn_and_return\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n\n        # Check minimum SM version for Cutlass backend\n        if sm_version < 80:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"CutlassFusedMoE requires SM >= 80, got SM{sm_version}\")\n\n        # Check gptoss_style support\n        if gptoss_style and quant_algo not in cls._GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"CutlassFusedMoE gptoss_style only supports W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 \"\n                f\"(got quant_algo={quant_algo})\")\n\n        # Check if quant_algo is supported\n        if quant_algo not in cls._QUANT_SUPPORT_TABLE:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"CutlassFusedMoE does not support quant_algo={quant_algo}\")\n\n        support_info = cls._QUANT_SUPPORT_TABLE[quant_algo]\n\n        # Check SM version constraint\n        constraint_type, constraint_value = support_info[\"sm_constraint\"]\n        algo_name = \"unquantized\" if quant_algo is None else quant_algo.name\n\n        if constraint_type == \"min\":\n            if sm_version < constraint_value:\n                return _warn_and_return(\n                    f\"CutlassFusedMoE {algo_name} requires SM >= {constraint_value}, \"\n                    f\"got SM{sm_version}\")\n        elif constraint_type == \"exact\":\n            if sm_version != constraint_value:\n                return _warn_and_return(\n                    f\"CutlassFusedMoE {algo_name} only supports SM{constraint_value}, \"\n                    f\"got SM{sm_version}\")\n        elif constraint_type == \"in\":\n            if sm_version not in constraint_value:\n                sm_list = \"/\".join(f\"SM{v}\" for v in sorted(constraint_value))\n                return _warn_and_return(\n                    f\"CutlassFusedMoE {algo_name} only supports {sm_list}, \"\n                    f\"got SM{sm_version}\")\n\n        # Check dtype_activation\n        supported_dtypes = support_info[\"dtypes\"]\n        if dtype_activation not in supported_dtypes:\n            dtype_list = \", \".join(str(d) for d in supported_dtypes)\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"CutlassFusedMoE {algo_name} requires {dtype_list}, \"\n                f\"got {dtype_activation}\")\n\n        return True, None\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n        num_experts: int,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        reduce_results: bool = False,\n        model_config: ModelConfig = ModelConfig(),\n        aux_stream_dict: Optional[Dict[AuxStreamType,\n                                       torch.cuda.Stream]] = None,\n        weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode = MoEWeightLoadingMode.\n        VANILLA,\n        bias: bool = False,\n        apply_router_weight_on_input: bool = False,\n        layer_idx: Optional[int] = None,\n        swiglu_alpha: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_beta: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_limit: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        init_load_balancer: bool = True,\n        without_comm: bool = False,\n        activation_type: ActivationType = ActivationType.Swiglu,\n    ):\n\n        super().__init__(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            bias=bias,\n            swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            init_load_balancer=init_load_balancer,\n            activation_type=activation_type,\n        )\n\n        # Store original hidden size before any potential padding\n        self.unpadded_hidden_size = self.hidden_size\n\n        if model_config.quant_config and model_config.quant_config.layer_quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4(\n        ):\n            self.hidden_size = ((self.hidden_size + 127) // 128) * 128\n            self.intermediate_size_per_partition = (\n                (self.intermediate_size_per_partition + 127) // 128) * 128\n\n        # Note: num_slots, expert_size_per_partition, initial_global_assignments,\n        # slot_start, slot_end, initial_local_expert_ids are all initialized by\n        # base class's _init_load_balancer() method\n\n        # moe_max_num_tokens is set in ModelConfig.__post_init__ if not specified\n        # The default value is max_num_tokens * dp_size\n        self.moe_max_num_tokens = model_config.moe_max_num_tokens\n        # The auxiliary CUDA stream and CUDA events are only used when MoE chunking is applied\n        default_moe_max_num_tokens = model_config.max_num_tokens * model_config.mapping.dp_size\n        if self.moe_max_num_tokens < default_moe_max_num_tokens:\n            self.aux_stream = aux_stream_dict[\n                AuxStreamType.\n                MoeChunkingOverlap] if aux_stream_dict is not None else torch.cuda.Stream(\n                )\n            self.event_dict = {\n                key: torch.cuda.Event()\n                for key in [EventType.Main, EventType.MoeChunkingOverlap]\n            }\n        else:\n            self.aux_stream = None\n            self.event_dict = None\n\n        # The profiler converges on the same best tactic when the number of tokens is large enough.\n        # To avoid long profiling time, the max number of tokens used in the profiling is capped to\n        # around 16k tokens per expert, which is well into the compute bound domain.\n        self.tune_max_num_tokens = min(\n            self.moe_max_num_tokens,\n            16384 * self.num_slots // routing_method.get_experts_per_token(),\n        )\n        self.has_been_profiled = False\n        self.has_been_profiled_min_latency = False",
    "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_cutlass.py",
    "numLines": 200,
    "startLine": 90,
    "totalLines": 1061
  },
  "type": "text"
}
45. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_trtllm_gen.py",
  "limit": 150,
  "offset": 75
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "    When we have redundant expert, we have more weight slots than `num_experts`, in that case, we separate the concepts of expert and slot.\n    Expert is the concept from model's perspective while slot is the concept from model engine's perspective.\n    There should be at lease `num_experts` slots in the model engine. More than that is OK, in that case, some experts may have multiple replicas.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    # Supported quantization algorithms for TRTLLMGenFusedMoE\n    _SUPPORTED_QUANT_ALGOS = {\n        QuantAlgo.NVFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,\n    }\n\n    # Quantization algorithms that support gptoss_style\n    _GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS = {\n        QuantAlgo.NVFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8,\n        QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8,\n    }\n\n    @classmethod\n    def can_implement(\n        cls,\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo],\n        dtype_activation: torch.dtype = torch.bfloat16,\n        gptoss_style: bool = False,\n    ) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Check if TRTLLMGenFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.\n\n        TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports SM in {100, 103} and the following quantizations:\n        - NVFP4\n        - FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\n        - W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n        - W4A16_MXFP4\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        Does NOT support unquantized mode. Output dtype is hardcoded to bfloat16.\n\n        Args:\n            quant_algo: The quantization algorithm to check (None for unquantized)\n            dtype_activation: The activation input data type. Only bfloat16 is supported.\n                See: forward_impl() assert x.dtype == torch.bfloat16 (line 722).\n            gptoss_style: Whether gptoss_style (bias/swiglu with custom alpha/beta/limit) is enabled.\n                Only supported for nvfp4 and mxfp4 variants.\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]: (can_implement, skip_reason)\n        \"\"\"\n        from .interface import _warn_and_return\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n\n        # TRTLLMGenFusedMoE requires SM in {100, 103}\n        if sm_version not in {100, 103}:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE requires SM100 or SM103, got SM{sm_version}\"\n            )\n\n        # Check dtype_activation: only bfloat16 is supported\n        if dtype_activation != torch.bfloat16:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports bfloat16 activation, got {dtype_activation}\"\n            )\n\n        # TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does NOT support unquantized mode\n        if quant_algo is None:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does not support unquantized mode\")\n\n        # Check if quant_algo is supported\n        if quant_algo not in cls._SUPPORTED_QUANT_ALGOS:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does not support quant_algo={quant_algo}\")\n\n        # Check gptoss_style support: only supported for nvfp4 and mxfp4 variants\n        if gptoss_style and quant_algo not in cls._GPTOSS_SUPPORTED_ALGOS:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE supports gptoss_style (bias/swiglu) only for nvfp4 and mxfp4 variants, \"\n                f\"got quant_algo={quant_algo}\")\n\n        return True, None\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n        num_experts: int,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        reduce_results: bool = False,\n        model_config: ModelConfig = ModelConfig(),\n        aux_stream_dict: Optional[Dict[AuxStreamType,\n                                       torch.cuda.Stream]] = None,\n        weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode = MoEWeightLoadingMode.\n        VANILLA,\n        layer_idx: Optional[int] = None,\n        bias: bool = False,\n        swiglu_alpha: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_beta: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_limit: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        init_load_balancer: bool = True,\n        without_comm: bool = False,\n        activation_type: ActivationType = ActivationType.Swiglu,\n    ):\n        super().__init__(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            aux_stream_dict=aux_stream_dict,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            bias=bias,\n            swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            init_load_balancer=init_load_balancer,\n            activation_type=activation_type,\n        )\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n        if sm_version >= 120:\n            raise NotImplementedError(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE does not support SM120 and above.\")\n\n        assert not self.smart_router, \"Smart router is not supported in TRTLLMGenFusedMoE.\"\n\n        # Note: Load balancer initialization is handled by base class _init_load_balancer()\n        # If no load balancer is available, the base class will set:\n        # - self.num_slots = self.num_experts\n        # - self.expert_size_per_partition = self.num_experts // self.ep_size\n        # - self.initial_global_assignments, self.slot_start, self.slot_end, etc.\n\n        # When without_comm=True, skip communication initialization (ConfigurableMoE will handle it)\n        if not without_comm:\n            self.alltoall_method_type = self.select_alltoall_method_type()\n            logger.info_once(\n                f\"{self.__class__.__name__} selects alltoall_method_type {self.alltoall_method_type!r}\",\n                key=\"alltoall_method_type\")\n            self.alltoall_workspace = None\n            self.alltoall_prepare_workspace = None",
    "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_trtllm_gen.py",
    "numLines": 150,
    "startLine": 75,
    "totalLines": 1077
  },
  "type": "text"
}

{
  "file": {
    "content": "from enum import IntEnum\n\nimport torch\n\n# The declarations must be aligned with thUtils.h\nSF_DTYPE = torch.uint8\nFLOAT4_E2M1X2 = torch.uint8\n\n# For GEMM autotuning.\n# Taken from https://github.com/NVIDIA/TensorRT-LLM/blob/main/cpp/include/tensorrt_llm/runtime//modelConfig.h#L38\n# TODO: move to model config, tune for blackwell hardware\nFP4_BUCKETS = [64, 128, 256, 512, 1024]\n\n# Export\nfloat4_e2m1x2 = FLOAT4_E2M1X2\nfloat4_sf_dtype = SF_DTYPE\nfp4_buckets = FP4_BUCKETS\n\n__all__ = ['float4_e2m1x2', 'float4_sf_dtype', 'pad_up', 'fp4_buckets']\n\n\ndef pad_up(x: int, y: int) -> int:\n    return ((x + y - 1) // y) * y\n\n\nclass FP4GemmType(IntEnum):\n    W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4 = 0\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = 1\n\n\ndef get_fp4_shape(input_shape, sf_vec_size, is_swizzled_layout=True):\n    m = 1\n    for i in range(len(input_shape) - 1):\n        m *= input_shape[i]\n\n    output_shape = [i for i in input_shape]\n    output_shape[-1] //= 2\n\n    scale_shape = pad_up(m, 128) * pad_up(\n        input_shape[-1] // sf_vec_size,\n        4) if is_swizzled_layout else m * (input_shape[-1] // sf_vec_size)\n    return output_shape, scale_shape\n\n\ndef get_reorder_rows_for_gated_act_gemm_row_indices(x) -> torch.Tensor:\n    \"\"\"\n    Reorders rows in the gemm/MOE_gemm weight matrix for min-latency\n    [r0, r1, r2, r3, ..., rN/2, r(N/2+1), .. r(N-1)]\n    to\n    [r0, rN/2, r1, rN/2+1, ..., r(N/2-1), r(N-1)]\n    \"\"\"\n    M = x.shape[0]\n    assert M % 2 == 0, f\"x.shape[0] must be even, not {M}\"\n\n    row_indices = torch.arange(M, dtype=torch.long)\n\n    # We split into top half and bottom half, but if M is odd,\n    # the bottom half is one row larger.\n    top = row_indices[:(M + 1) // 2]  # round up\n    bot = row_indices[(M + 1) // 2:]  # remainder\n\n    # Create the output\n    permuted_row_indices = torch.empty_like(row_indices)\n\n    # We'll place rows of `top` and `bot` in alternation\n    permuted_row_indices[0::2] = top\n    permuted_row_indices[1::2] = bot\n\n    return permuted_row_indices\n\n\ndef reorder_rows_for_gated_act_gemm(x):\n    \"\"\"\n    PyTorch implementation of trt-llm gen `reorderRowsForGatedActGemm`\n    \"\"\"\n    row_indices = get_reorder_rows_for_gated_act_gemm_row_indices(x)\n\n    permute = lambda x: x[row_indices]\n\n    return permute(x)\n\n\n# yapf: disable\nsrcToDstBlk16RowMap = [\n    0,  8,\n    1,  9,\n    2, 10,\n    3, 11,\n    4, 12,\n    5, 13,\n    6, 14,\n    7, 15\n]\n\nsrcToDstBlk32RowMap = [\n    0,  8, 16, 24,\n    1,  9, 17, 25,\n    2, 10, 18, 26,\n    3, 11, 19, 27,\n    4, 12, 20, 28,\n    5, 13, 21, 29,\n    6, 14, 22, 30,\n    7, 15, 23, 31\n]\n# yapf: enable\n\n\ndef get_shuffle_block_size(epilogue_tile_m: int) -> int:\n    shuffle_block_size = 16\n    if epilogue_tile_m % 128 == 0:\n        shuffle_block_size = 32\n    return shuffle_block_size\n\n\ndef get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices(input_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n                                     epilogue_tile_m: int) -> torch.Tensor:\n    \"\"\"\n    Higher-level PyTorch approach to reorder the rows in blocks of size 16 or 32.\n    - We do NOT try to handle custom e2m1 memory usage (i.e. no 'K/2' bytes).\n    - Instead, we purely reorder rows in a standard PyTorch shape [M, K].\n    \"\"\"\n    # M from the input\n    M = input_tensor.shape[0]\n\n    # Choose block size 16 or 32\n    shuffle_block_size = get_shuffle_block_size(epilogue_tile_m)\n    row_map = (srcToDstBlk16RowMap\n               if shuffle_block_size == 16 else srcToDstBlk32RowMap)\n\n    assert M % shuffle_block_size == 0, f\"input_tensor.shape[0] must be multiples of {shuffle_block_size}\"\n\n    # row_indices[new_row] = old_row\n    # so row_indices is an array of size M telling us from which old_row\n    # the new_row should be taken.\n    row_indices = torch.empty(M, dtype=torch.long)\n\n    for old_row in range(M):\n        block_idx = old_row // shuffle_block_size\n        row_in_block = old_row % shuffle_block_size\n        mapped_row_in_block = row_map[row_in_block]\n\n        new_row = block_idx * shuffle_block_size + mapped_row_in_block\n\n        row_indices[new_row] = old_row\n\n    return row_indices\n\n\ndef shuffle_matrix_a(input_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n                     epilogue_tile_m: int) -> torch.Tensor:\n    \"\"\"\n    PyTorch equivalent of trtllm-gen `shuffleMatrixA`\n    \"\"\"\n    row_indices = get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices(input_tensor,\n                                                   epilogue_tile_m)\n\n    return torch.ops.trtllm.shuffle_matrix(input_tensor,\n                                           row_indices.to(input_tensor.device))\n\n\ndef get_shuffle_matrix_sf_a_row_indices(\n        input_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n        epilogue_tile_m: int,\n        num_elts_per_sf: int = 16) -> torch.Tensor:\n\n    assert input_tensor.dtype == float4_sf_dtype\n    assert num_elts_per_sf == 16 or num_elts_per_sf == 32\n\n    assert input_tensor.dim(\n    ) == 2, f\"input_tensor should be a 2D tensor, not {input_tensor.dim()}\"\n\n    # M, K from the input\n    M, K = input_tensor.shape\n    assert M % 128 == 0\n    assert K % 4 == 0\n\n    row_indices = get_shuffle_matrix_a_row_indices(input_tensor,\n                                                   epilogue_tile_m)\n\n    return row_indices\n\n\ndef shuffle_matrix_sf_a(\n    input_tensor: torch.Tensor,\n    epilogue_tile_m: int,\n    num_elts_per_sf: int = 16,\n):\n    \"\"\"\n    Cuda implementation of trtllm-gen `shuffleMatrixSfA` but with a caveat.\n    `shuffleMatrixSfA` expects the input to be in 128x4 layout and then\n    apply the same shuffling in `shuffleMatrixA` and writes out in 128x4\n    layout.\n    This function expects the input to be in linear layout. It's done this\n    way because the scaling factors in the NVFP4 checkpoints are quantized\n    and are in linear layout.\n    This function doesn't add padding.\n    \"\"\"\n\n    row_indices = get_shuffle_matrix_sf_a_row_indices(input_tensor,\n                                                      epilogue_tile_m)\n\n    w_shuffled = torch.ops.trtllm.shuffle_matrix(\n        input_tensor, row_indices.to(input_tensor.device))\n\n    # 128x4\n    return torch.ops.trtllm.block_scale_interleave(w_shuffled)\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/utils/fp4_utils.py",
    "numLines": 207,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 207
  },
  "type": "text"
}

{
  "file": {
    "content": "    weight: torch.Tensor,\n    act_sf: torch.Tensor,\n    weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n    alpha: torch.Tensor,\n    output_dtype: torch.dtype,\n    to_userbuffers: bool = False,\n) -> torch.Tensor:\n\n    tuner = AutoTuner.get()\n\n    # allocate workspace for profiling\n    w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm_runner = FP4GemmRunner(\n        fp4_utils.FP4GemmType.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8, to_userbuffers, output_dtype)\n\n    _, best_tactic = tuner.choose_one(\n        \"trtllm::w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm::gemm\",\n        [w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm_runner],\n        FP4GemmRunner.tuning_config,\n        [act_fp8, weight, act_sf, weight_scale, alpha],\n    )\n\n    return w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm_runner(\n        inputs=[act_fp8, weight, act_sf, weight_scale, alpha],\n        tactic=best_tactic)\n\n\n@w4a8_mxfp4_fp8_gemm.register_fake\ndef _(\n    act_fp4: torch.Tensor,\n    weight: torch.Tensor,\n    act_sf: torch.Tensor,\n    weight_scale: torch.Tensor,\n    alpha: torch.Tensor,\n    output_dtype: torch.dtype,\n    to_userbuffers: bool = False,\n) -> torch.Tensor:\n    return act_fp8.new_empty((act_fp8.size(0), weight.size(0)),\n                             dtype=output_dtype)\n\n\nclass WeightOnlyQuantGemmRunner(TunableRunner):\n    runner_dict = dict()\n    tuning_config = TuningConfig(dynamic_tensor_specs=(\n        DynamicTensorSpec(0, 0, get_last_power_of_2_num_tokens_buckets,\n                          last_positive_power_of_2), ))\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        activation_dtype: torch.dtype,\n        weight_dtype: torch.dtype,",
    "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/custom_ops/torch_custom_ops.py",

Input

  "limit": 80,
  "offset": 1285

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "        dtype_activation: torch.dtype = torch.bfloat16,\n        gptoss_style: bool = False,\n    ) -> Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]:\n        \"\"\"\n        Check if TritonFusedMoE can implement the given quantization algorithm.\n\n        TritonFusedMoE supports (SM90 only, gptoss_style=True only):\n        - Unquantized (BF16 only)\n        - FP8 per-tensor (QDQ)\n        - W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n        - W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        Args:\n            quant_algo: The quantization algorithm to check (None for unquantized)\n            dtype_activation: The activation data type. In unquantized mode, activation,\n                weight, and output dtypes must all match (only bfloat16 supported).\n            gptoss_style: Whether gptoss_style (bias/swiglu with custom alpha/beta/limit) is enabled.\n                TritonFusedMoE ONLY supports gptoss_style=True.\n\n        Returns:\n            Tuple[bool, Optional[str]]: (can_implement, skip_reason)\n        \"\"\"\n        from tensorrt_llm._utils import get_sm_version\n        from tensorrt_llm.models.modeling_utils import QuantAlgo\n\n        from .interface import _warn_and_return\n\n        sm_version = get_sm_version()\n\n        # TritonFusedMoE only supports SM90\n        if sm_version != 90:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                f\"TritonFusedMoE only supports SM90, got SM{sm_version}\")\n\n        # TritonFusedMoE ONLY supports gptoss_style=True\n        if not gptoss_style:\n            return _warn_and_return(\n                \"TritonFusedMoE only supports gptoss_style=True\")\n\n        # Unquantized mode - only bfloat16 is supported\n        if quant_algo is None:\n            if dtype_activation != torch.bfloat16:\n                return _warn_and_return(\n                    f\"TritonFusedMoE unquantized mode only supports bfloat16, got {dtype_activation}\"\n                )\n            return True, None\n\n        # FP8 per-tensor (QDQ) and W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 - no dtype_activation restriction\n        if quant_algo in {QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8}:\n            return True, None\n\n        # W4A16_MXFP4 - only bfloat16 and float16 are supported\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            if dtype_activation not in {torch.bfloat16, torch.float16}:\n                return _warn_and_return(\n                    f\"TritonFusedMoE W4A16_MXFP4 only supports bfloat16 or float16, \"\n                    f\"got {dtype_activation}\")\n            return True, None\n\n        # Unsupported quantization algorithm\n        return _warn_and_return(\n            f\"TritonFusedMoE does not support quant_algo={quant_algo}\")\n\n    def __init__(\n        self,\n        *,\n        routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n        num_experts: int,\n        hidden_size: int,\n        intermediate_size: int,\n        dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n        reduce_results: bool = False,\n        model_config: ModelConfig = ModelConfig(),\n        weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode = MoEWeightLoadingMode.\n        VANILLA,\n        bias: bool = False,\n        layer_idx: Optional[int] = None,\n        swiglu_alpha: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_beta: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n        swiglu_limit: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,",
    "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/fused_moe_triton.py",
    "numLines": 80,
    "startLine": 1285,
    "totalLines": 1481
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "file": {
    "content": "        out = torch_ext::create_userbuffers_tensor(out_shape, out_dtype.value()).first;\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        out = at::detail::empty_cuda(out_shape, out_dtype.value(), mat1.device(), std::nullopt);\n    }\n    switch (out_dtype.value())\n    {\n    case at::ScalarType::Half:\n        runGemm<half>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::BFloat16:\n        runGemm<__nv_bfloat16>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    case at::ScalarType::Float:\n        runGemm<float>(out, mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, m, n, k, b, config, fp4GemmType);\n        break;\n    default: C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n    }\n    return out;\n}\n\n} // namespace\n\nat::Tensor fp4_bmm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n    at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, int64_t fp4GemmType,\n    std::optional<c10::ScalarType> out_dtype)\n{\n    // The functional version of this op does not do any profiling; use the profiler class below instead for\n    // better performance.\n    // Note that we can still add a heuristic here.\n    return fp4_bmm_impl(\n        mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType), out_dtype);\n}\n\nclass FP4GemmRunner : public torch::CustomClassHolder\n{\npublic:\n    explicit FP4GemmRunner(at::ScalarType outputDtype, int64_t fp4GemmType)\n        : mOutputDtype(outputDtype)\n        , mfp4GemmType(static_cast<FP4GemmType>(fp4GemmType))\n    {\n        if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Half)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<half, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::Float)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<float, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#ifdef ENABLE_BF16\n        else if (outputDtype == at::ScalarType::BFloat16)\n        {\n            if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8>>();\n            }\n            else if (mfp4GemmType == FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4)\n            {\n                mGemmRunner = std::make_unique<CutlassFp4GemmRunner<__nv_bfloat16, FP4GemmType::W4A4_NVFP4_NVFP4>>();\n            }\n        }\n#endif\n        else\n        {\n            C10_THROW_ERROR(NotImplementedError, \"out_dtype must be one of fp16/bf16/fp32.\");\n        }\n        mConfigs = mGemmRunner->getConfigs();\n    }\n\n    at::Tensor runGemm(at::Tensor const& mat1, at::Tensor const& mat2, at::Tensor const& mat1Scale,\n        at::Tensor const& mat2Scale, at::Tensor const& globalScale, bool to_userbuffers, int64_t configIdx) const\n    {\n        tkc::CutlassGemmConfig const* config = nullptr;\n        if (configIdx != -1)\n        {\n            TORCH_CHECK(configIdx >= 0 && configIdx < getNumConfigs());\n            config = &mConfigs.at(configIdx);\n        }\n        return fp4_bmm_impl(\n            mat1, mat2, mat1Scale, mat2Scale, globalScale, mfp4GemmType, mOutputDtype, to_userbuffers, config);\n    }\n\n    at::ScalarType getOutputDtype() const\n    {\n        return mOutputDtype;\n    }\n\n    int64_t getNumConfigs() const\n    {\n        return static_cast<int64_t>(mConfigs.size());\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    std::shared_ptr<CutlassFp4GemmRunnerInterface> mGemmRunner{nullptr};\n    std::vector<tkc::CutlassGemmConfig> mConfigs;\n    at::ScalarType mOutputDtype;\n    FP4GemmType mfp4GemmType;\n};\n} // namespace torch_ext\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n\nTORCH_LIBRARY_FRAGMENT(trtllm, m)\n{\n    m.class_<tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner>(\"FP4GemmRunner\")\n        .def(torch::init<at::ScalarType, int64_t>())\n        .def(\"run_gemm\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner::runGemm)\n        .def(\"get_num_configs\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::FP4GemmRunner::getNumConfigs);\n\n    m.def(\n        \"fp4_bmm(Tensor mat1, Tensor mat2, Tensor mat1Scale, Tensor mat2Scale, Tensor globalScale, int fp4GemmType, \"\n        \"ScalarType? out_dtype=None) -> Tensor\");\n    m.def(\n        \"fp4_gemm(Tensor mat1, Tensor mat2, Tensor mat1Scale, Tensor mat2Scale, Tensor globalScale, int fp4GemmType, \"\n        \"ScalarType? out_dtype=None) -> Tensor\");\n}\n\nTORCH_LIBRARY_IMPL(trtllm, CUDA, m)\n{\n    m.impl(\"fp4_bmm\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::fp4_bmm);\n    m.impl(\"fp4_gemm\", &tensorrt_llm::torch_ext::fp4_bmm);\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/cpp/tensorrt_llm/thop/fp4Gemm.cpp",
    "numLines": 138,
    "startLine": 200,
    "totalLines": 337
  },
  "type": "text"
}

Output
{
  "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py",
  "newString": "    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()\n    NO_QUANT = auto()",
  "oldString": "    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()\n    NO_QUANT = auto()",
  "originalFile": "# SPDX-FileCopyrightText: Copyright (c) 2022-2024 NVIDIA CORPORATION & AFFILIATES. All rights reserved.\n# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0\n#\n# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n# You may obtain a copy of the License at\n#\n# http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n#\n# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n# distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n# limitations under the License.\nfrom enum import IntFlag, auto\nfrom typing import Optional\n\nfrom strenum import StrEnum\n\nfrom .._utils import BaseEnumMeta\n\n\nclass QuantAlgo(StrEnum, metaclass=BaseEnumMeta):\n    W8A16 = auto()\n    W4A16 = auto()\n    W4A16_AWQ = auto()\n    W4A8_AWQ = auto()\n    W8A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W4A16_GPTQ = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP = auto()\n    W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    FP8 = auto()\n    FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    FP8_BLOCK_SCALES = auto()\n    INT8 = auto()\n    MIXED_PRECISION = auto()\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_AWQ = auto()\n    NO_QUANT = auto()\n\n\nQUANT_ALGO_LIST = list(set(QuantAlgo) - {QuantAlgo.INT8})\nKV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST = [QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.INT8, QuantAlgo.NVFP4]\nW8A8_SQ_PLUGIN_LIST = [\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN,\n    QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN,\n]\nMODELOPT_FLOW_QUANTIZATIONS = {\n    QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ, QuantAlgo.FP8, QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL,\n    QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ\n}\n\n\nclass QuantMode(IntFlag):\n    # [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH cpp/tensorrt_llm/common/quantization.h\n\n    # The weights are quantized to 4 bits.\n    INT4_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The weights are quantized to 8 bits.\n    INT8_WEIGHTS = auto()\n    # The activations are quantized.\n    ACTIVATIONS = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per channel. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_CHANNEL = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per token. It's computed on-the-fly.\n    PER_TOKEN = auto()\n    # The method uses one scaling factor per group. It's pre-computed (static) from the weights.\n    PER_GROUP = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in INT8.\n    INT8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # The KV cache is quantized in FP8.\n    FP8_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # FP8 QDQ\n    FP8_QDQ = auto()\n    # FP8 rowwise\n    FP8_ROWWISE = auto()\n    # FP8 block scales for Deepseek\n    FP8_1x128_128x128 = auto()\n    # W4A8 qserve\n    W4A8_QSERVE = auto()\n    # FP4\n    NVFP4 = auto()\n    NVFP4_KV_CACHE = auto()\n    # W4A8 NVFP4\n    W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    # W4A8 MXFP4\n    W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()\n    W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()\n    W4A16_MXFP4 = auto()\n\n    # The smallest power-of-two that is not used by a flag. Do not call auto() after that line.\n    COUNT = auto()\n\n    # Bitmask to detect if weights, activations or both are quantized.\n    WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS = INT4_WEIGHTS | INT8_WEIGHTS | ACTIVATIONS\n    # The mask of all valid flags.\n    VALID_FLAGS = COUNT - 1\n\n    def __deepcopy__(self, memo):\n        return self\n\n    # All the bits set? You can restrict the test to the bits indicated by \"mask\".\n    def _all(self, bits, mask=VALID_FLAGS):\n        return (self & mask) == bits\n\n    # Is one of the bits of the mask set?\n    def _any(self, bits):\n        return (self & bits) != 0\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT4_WEIGHTS, self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def is_weight_only(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() or self.is_int8_weight_only()\n\n    def is_int8_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int8_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    # TODO: Using the current flags cannot distinguish between w4aFP8 AWQ and w4a8 QServe.\n    def is_qserve_w4a8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_QSERVE)\n\n    def is_int4_weight_only_per_group(self):\n        return self.is_int4_weight_only() and self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_act_and_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._all(self.INT8_WEIGHTS | self.ACTIVATIONS,\n                         self.WEIGHTS_AND_ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_act_or_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                         | self.ACTIVATIONS)\n\n    def has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_TOKEN)\n\n    def has_fp8_block_scales(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_1x128_128x128)\n\n    def has_act_static_scaling(self):\n        return not self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(\n        ) and not self.has_fp8_rowwise()\n\n    def has_per_channel_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_CHANNEL)\n\n    def has_per_group_scaling(self):\n        return self._any(self.PER_GROUP)\n\n    def has_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def has_kv_cache_quant(self):\n        return (self.has_int8_kv_cache() or self.has_fp8_kv_cache()\n                or self.has_fp4_kv_cache())\n\n    def has_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_QDQ)\n\n    def has_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self._any(self.FP8_ROWWISE)\n\n    def has_nvfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.NVFP4)\n\n    def has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8)\n\n    def has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n\n    def has_w4a16_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_mxfp4(self):\n        return self._any(self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n                         | self.W4A16_MXFP4)\n\n    def has_weight_quant(self):\n        return self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS | self.INT8_WEIGHTS)\n\n    def has_any_quant(self, exclude_kv_cache: bool = False):\n        has_quant = self._any(self.INT4_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.INT8_WEIGHTS\n                              | self.ACTIVATIONS\n                              | self.FP8_QDQ | self.FP8_ROWWISE\n                              | self.W4A8_QSERVE\n                              | self.FP8_1x128_128x128\n                              | self.NVFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n                              | self.W4A16_MXFP4\n                              | self.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8)\n        if exclude_kv_cache:\n            return has_quant\n\n        return has_quant | self._any(self.INT8_KV_CACHE | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n                                     | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE)\n\n    def set_int8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp4_kv_cache(self):\n        return self | self.NVFP4_KV_CACHE\n\n    def set_fp8_qdq(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_QDQ\n\n    def set_fp8_rowwise(self):\n        return self | self.FP8_ROWWISE | self.PER_TOKEN | self.PER_CHANNEL\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_description(quantize_weights=False,\n                         quantize_activations=False,\n                         per_token=False,\n                         per_channel=False,\n                         per_group=False,\n                         use_int4_weights=False,\n                         use_int8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_kv_cache=False,\n                         use_fp8_qdq=False,\n                         use_fp8_block_scales=False,\n                         use_fp8_rowwise=False,\n                         use_nvfp4=False,\n                         use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_qserve=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=False,\n                         use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=False,\n                         use_w4a16_mxfp4=False):\n\n        def raise_error():\n            raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported combination of QuantMode args: \"\n                             f\"{quantize_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{quantize_activations=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_token=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_channel=}, \"\n                             f\"{per_group=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int4_weights=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_int8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_kv_cache=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_qdq=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_block_scales=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_fp8_rowwise=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_nvfp4=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_qserve=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=}, \"\n                             f\"{use_w4a16_mxfp4=}\")\n\n        # We must quantize weights when we quantize activations.\n        if quantize_activations and not quantize_weights:\n            raise_error()\n\n        # If we set per_token or per_channel, we must quantize both weights and activations.\n        if (per_token or per_channel) and not (quantize_weights\n                                               and quantize_activations):\n            raise_error()\n\n        mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        # Do we quantize the weights - if so, do we use INT4 or INT8?\n        if quantize_weights and use_int4_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT4_WEIGHTS\n        elif quantize_weights:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_WEIGHTS\n\n        # Do we quantize the activations?\n        if quantize_activations:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.ACTIVATIONS\n\n        # Per-channel/per-token/per-group additional flags.\n        if per_channel:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n        if per_token:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN\n        if per_group:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.PER_GROUP\n\n        # Int8 KV cache\n        if use_int8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.INT8_KV_CACHE\n\n        # FP8 KV cache\n        if use_fp8_kv_cache:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_KV_CACHE\n\n        if use_fp8_qdq:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_QDQ\n\n        if use_fp8_rowwise:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_ROWWISE | QuantMode.PER_TOKEN | QuantMode.PER_CHANNEL\n\n        if use_fp8_block_scales:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.FP8_1x128_128x128\n\n        if use_nvfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.NVFP4\n\n        if use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8\n\n        # W4A8 QServe\n        if use_w4a8_qserve:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_QSERVE\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\n\n        if use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\n\n        if use_w4a16_mxfp4:\n            mode = mode | QuantMode.W4A16_MXFP4\n\n        return mode\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_smooth_quant(per_token=False, per_channel=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(True, True, per_token, per_channel)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_qserve(per_group):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=True,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=True,\n                                          use_w4a8_qserve=True)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False, per_group=False):\n        return QuantMode.from_description(quantize_weights=True,\n                                          quantize_activations=False,\n                                          per_token=False,\n                                          per_channel=False,\n                                          per_group=per_group,\n                                          use_int4_weights=use_int4_weights)\n\n    @staticmethod\n    def from_quant_algo(\n        quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n        kv_cache_quant_algo: Optional[QuantAlgo] = None,\n    ) -> \"QuantMode\":\n        assert quant_algo is None or quant_algo in QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        assert kv_cache_quant_algo is None or kv_cache_quant_algo in KV_CACHE_QUANT_ALGO_LIST\n        if quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_AWQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=True,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A16_GPTQ:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_weight_only(use_int4_weights=False,\n                                                   per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=False,\n                                                    per_channel=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_smooth_quant(per_token=True,\n                                                    per_channel=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.use_qserve(per_group=False)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_qdq=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_rowwise=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8_BLOCK_SCALES:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_fp8_block_scales=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4_AWQ:\n            # NVFP4_AWQ uses the same QuantMode as NVFP4, distinction is at QuantAlgo level\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_nvfp4=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_NVFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_FP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8=True)\n        elif quant_algo == QuantAlgo.W4A16_MXFP4:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode.from_description(use_w4a16_mxfp4=True)\n        else:\n            quant_mode = QuantMode(0)\n\n        if kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.INT8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_int8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.FP8:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp8_kv_cache()\n        elif kv_cache_quant_algo == QuantAlgo.NVFP4:\n            quant_mode = quant_mode.set_fp4_kv_cache()\n\n        return quant_mode\n\n    def to_dict(self):\n        return {\n            'use_smooth_quant':\n            self.has_act_and_weight_quant(),\n            'per_channel':\n            self.has_per_channel_scaling(),\n            'per_token':\n            self.has_per_token_dynamic_scaling(),\n            'per_group':\n            self.has_per_group_scaling(),\n            'int8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_int8_kv_cache(),\n            'enable_fp8':\n            self.has_fp8_qdq(),\n            'enable_fp8_rowwise':\n            self.has_fp8_rowwise(),\n            'enable_fp8_block_scales':\n            self.has_fp8_block_scales(),\n            'enable_nvfp4':\n            self.has_nvfp4(),\n            'enable_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8(),\n            'enable_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8':\n            self.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8(),\n            'enable_w4a16_mxfp4':\n            self.has_w4a16_mxfp4(),\n            'fp8_kv_cache':\n            self.has_fp8_kv_cache(),\n            'use_weight_only':\n            self.is_weight_only(),\n            'weight_only_precision':\n            'int8' if self.is_int8_weight_only() else 'int4',\n        }\n\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo:\n    BIAS = 1\n    ZERO = 2\n    PRE_QUANT_SCALE = 4\n    W4A8_ALPHA = 8\n    INT8_WEIGHT = 16\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "     NVFP4 = auto()",
        "     W4A8_NVFP4_FP8 = auto()",
        "     W4A8_MXFP4_FP8 = auto()",
        "+    W4A8_MXFP4_INT8 = auto()",
        "     W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8 = auto()",
